creator: meetshamsher@gmail.com
text:
@Andriy Gapon

Update :
From last 8+ days its running fine. So far no vmcore observed.

Query:
As locked used for complete for(;;) loop. Which will not stop but do you thing due to this any performance impact will happen as at some point of time multiple threads might be spinning there?

Also do you have any plan for upstream of this patch.
